issuingAuthority: Van Anumodan Rule Governance — to be approved by competent authority before production gating
note: Instrument-level starter set. Verify every clause reference and add the exact provision, effective date and official source URL before this library gates any decision. Set 'super' when an instrument is superseded so historical findings remain reproducible.

rules.subject: B Legal Status
rules.clause: Preliminary / Sec. 2 — restriction on de-reservation & non-forest use
rules.notes: Parent statute (renamed from Forest (Conservation) Act, 1980 w.e.f. 2023). Prior approval of Central Government required for de-reservation / non-forest use.

rules.subject: B Legal Status
rules.notes: Applicability / exclusions inserted by the 2023 amendment. Trigger for checks B06, B07. Read with consolidated guidelines and clarifications dated 24.09.2024 / 06.10.2024 / 27.09.2024.

rules.subject: A/D/E/O/P Procedure
rules.clause: Rules 1–19 (approval process, PSC, REC, SIR, two-stage approval)
rules.notes: Principal procedural rules; came into force 01.12.2023 in supersession of Forest (Conservation) Rules, 2022. Governs DFO/CF/Nodal roles and processing timelines on PARIVESH 2.0.

rules.subject: I Compensatory Afforestation
rules.notes: Amends Rule 13 of the 2023 Rules (compensatory afforestation / accredited CA land provisos). Confirm exact gazette date and provision text before gating CA checks I01–I15.

rules.subject: B/A/E Consolidated guidance
rules.act: Consolidated Guidelines & Clarifications under the Adhiniyam, 1980 and Rules, 2023
rules.clause: MoEFCC consolidated guidelines (as amended by clarifications 2024–2025)
rules.notes: Living document. Track clarifications e.g. 13.05.2025, 07.04.2025, 25.03.2025, 29.11.2024 (Rule 11(10)/16(8)), 01.10.2024 (linear/NHAI). Add each as a superseding/dependent row when issued.

rules.subject: J NPV & Financial Liabilities
rules.act: Compensatory Afforestation Fund Act, 2016 (38 of 2016) & CAF Rules, 2018
rules.notes: Basis for NPV and other compensatory levies (checks J01–J05). Apply current MoEFCC NPV rates / eco-class multipliers.

rules.subject: K FRA and Rights
rules.act: Scheduled Tribes and Other Traditional Forest Dwellers (Recognition of Forest Rights) Act, 2006
rules.clause: FRA settlement & Gram Sabha consent; read with MoEFCC/MoTA directions
rules.notes: FRA compliance status and stage (checks K01–K05). Confirm current MoEFCC guideline on FRA compliance stage for forest diversion.

rules.subject: L Wildlife and Ecology
rules.clause: PA / ESZ / Sanctuary & NP; SBWL–NBWL–NTCA route; Sec. 26A/29/35/38O
rules.notes: Wildlife clearance route and CWLW/SBWL/NBWL/NTCA requirements (checks L01–L07). Read with Supreme Court / CEC directions.

rules.subject: B/L Judicial
rules.act: Supreme Court directions — T.N. Godavarman Thirumulpad v. Union of India (WP(C) 202/1995) & CEC
rules.clause: 'Forest' in dictionary sense; CEC scrutiny layer
rules.notes: Governs treatment of recorded/deemed forest and CEC oversight. Add case-specific IA / order references as applicable.

rules.subject: A/S State procedure
rules.act: State Government instructions — Uttarakhand Forest Department
rules.clause: State-level scrutiny, Nodal Officer establishment, forwarding orders
rules.notes: Placeholder for current Uttarakhand shasanadesh / office memoranda governing State-level scrutiny and forwarding. Populate with GO numbers and dates.
